Life Plans Math Physics Reflection

Repost: progress so far

March 11, 2026

SO here is the goal chart I set up,

F=ma 14 17 20 aleph

USAPhO QUal HM Bronze Gold

SAT 1500 1520 1560 aleph

AMC 12 95 105 120 135

Scioly 1medal 2 medal aleph aleph

USAMTS 30 HM aleph aleph

Robotics MakeStates aleph MakeNats aleph

Essay Competition Shortlist HighCommendation aleph aleph
and currently, I am at

Bronze

None

?

?

Silver

Bronze if I get lucky with p4

Bronze

?

which adds up to 3 bronze and 1 silver. So I'm at 5 points right now? Which is kind of good I guess but also really cooked since I really needed USAPhO qual. I think I got around 13-15, so I'd just say I got 14 on F=ma. Lucky guesses came through when I actually solved around 10.

For USAMTS, I really should be confident on 30, but I messed up p,1 and only the other two problems I solved were p2 and p4. For p2, I had a complete proof, and for p4, I only proved partially using Desargues ' theorem of smth. If I get 0 5 0 2 0 then I get 30. I really wanted hm but I guess not. I really had the chance if I had passed elementary school math.

Then, I am taking the SAT this weekend, with no prep like always..

I was kinda locked in for scioly in regionals, but in states I got trolled by my boomi. It kinda took me 7 hrs to build, and it was really decently built at a weight of about 6 grams. Broke at 2kg though! (I held 15kg with 8.8g boomi at regionals). It was actually tragic ngl. And bungee, I didn't see a rule change of heavy mass being -20pts. But still, we had no chance of winning bungee, and I saw some really crazy teams. The helicopter was decent, but I don't think it's good enough for a medal. Also, there was an event where my partner said he'd study, but couldn't even get one thing done during the actual comp.

Ok I just checked the results rn, but we got screwed over cuz our box was half an inch larger than the limit. I told them, "You should measure it from the inside" and they said we should be fine. Yeah, it flew for a minute 20 with 1.2x bonus and 1.1x bonus, so.. they definately disqualfied us

Yeah, and robotics we made states. Our school kinda never makes states, and I like to think that I carried them since I did everything (design, cad, build, and code skills). No one basically knows what the design is, and it really annoys me when they question without looking up simple robot designs. And funny thing is, I am not even a leader cuz I joined late. So I can't even yell at the leaders that asks me stupid question and waste time

Essay comp, idk

Comments
